user.title: EcoNet Grant Aerona
user.description: Enter the connection details for your ecoNET device.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the ecoNET device.

data_description.push_notifications: Send a push notification to all connected devices when a setting is changed externally (via the vendor app or control panel).
data_description.retention_days: Number of days to keep sensor readings and settings history (30-7300). Default: 3650 (10 years).
